query_title: As If It Were the First Time

recommendations.title: Memento
recommendations.overview: Leonard Shelby is tracking down the man who raped and murdered his wife. The difficulty of locating his wife's killer, however, is compounded by the fact that he suffers from a rare, untreatable form of short-term memory loss. Although he can recall

recommendations.title: 50 First Dates
recommendations.overview: Henry is a player skilled at seducing women. But when this veterinarian meets Lucy, a girl with a quirky problem when it comes to total recall, he realizes it's possible to fall in love all over again…and again, and again. That's because the delightf

recommendations.title: The Legend of Al, John and Jack
recommendations.overview: Hapless Depression-era gangsters Al, John and Jack find out their boss wants to get rid of them and come up with a plan to sell him to the FBI, but Al's short-term memory loss could make it difficult.
recommendations.director: Giovanni Storti, Massimo Venier, Giacomo Poretti, Aldo Baglio

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Little Fish
recommendations.overview: A couple fights to hold their relationship together as a memory loss virus spreads and threatens to erase the history of their love and courtship.

recommendations.title: City Lights
recommendations.overview: A tramp falls in love with a beautiful blind flower girl. His on-and-off friendship with a wealthy man allows him to be the girl's benefactor and suitor.

recommendations.title: Remember Sunday
recommendations.overview: A lonely, down-on-her-luck waitress meets a handsome, quirky jewelry store clerk and thinks that maybe, finally, she's met Mr. Right. The more Molly gets to know Gus, the more she's intrigued by him. But she's also mystified. Gus is absent-minded, pr

recommendations.title: If Anything Happens I Love You
recommendations.overview: In this Oscar-winning short film, grieving parents journey through an emotional void as they mourn the loss of a child after a tragic school shooting.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: Lavender
recommendations.overview: A photographer struggling with memory loss discovers her pictures may indicate something sinister is hitting close to home.
